response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of the instrumental conclusion/dance of 'Intergalactic Bound' followed by a spoken segment where Cecilia Immergreen announces her original song 'Wind Up'. The reference JSON contains song lyrics that are not actively sung in this specific clip (only instrumental/vocal samples are present), so I am discarding the unused lyrics and focusing on transcribing/translating the spoken interaction and the final visual letter. All timestamps are precisely aligned with her vocal delivery and the appearance of text on screen.

subtitles.english: It's called "Wind Up". So... um, yeah. Very nervous. I hope you like it.
